figures.caption: Figure 9. TIM game interface with playfield in the middle (blue area), parts bin as well as navigation buttons on the right and task description at the bottom.

Table 1. Benchmark structure overview: PL (Parts List), PD (Parts Descriptions), GI (Game Instructions), AI (Actions Instructions), SC (Single Choice), bbox, LLM-E (LLM-Eval), H-E (Human-Eval), SR (Success Rate), IoU, ED (Euclidean Distance)
